1.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
1.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, girls, i.e. the soprano or female voice, perhaps falsetto
Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites

2.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
2.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

2.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
2.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:
2.kj: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble.

2.gl: strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)
2.kj: boldness, loud, might, power, strength, strong.

3.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
3.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

3.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
3.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

3.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
3.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

3.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
3.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

3.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
3.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

3.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

4.gl: to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor
4.kj: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar.

4.gl: to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust)
4.kj: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble.

4.gl: properly, to boil up; hence, to ferment (with scum); to glow (with redness); to smear with pitch
4.dv: a primitive root; also  as denominative (from H2564 (חֵמָר))

4.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
4.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

4.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament
4.kj: excellency, haughtiness, highness, pride, proudly, swelling.

5.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
5.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

5.gl: a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls)
a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
5.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
5.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

5.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
5.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

5.gl: sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint, a sanctuary
a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity

6.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

6.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
6.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

6.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
6.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

6.gl: properly, dawn (as the break of day); generally, morning

7.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
7.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
7.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

7.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts

8.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
8.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

8.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

8.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

8.gl: defence, high fort (tower), refuge, Misgab, a place in Moab
8.dv: from H7682 (שָׂגַב); properly, a cliff (or other lofty or inaccessible place); abstractly, altitude; figuratively, a refuge

8.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
8.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

9.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)

9.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
9.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

9.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
9.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

10.gl: to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific)

[idiom] after, border, brim, brink, edge, end, (in-) finite, frontier, outmost coast, quarter, shore, (out-) side, [idiom] some, ut(-ter-) most (part).
10.dv: or (negative only) קֵצֶה; from H7096 (קָצָה); (used in a great variety of applications and idioms; compare H7093 (קֵץ))

10.kj: break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).

10.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
10.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
10.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

10.gl: a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare)
10.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם) (in the sense of fighting);
